properties.effects: Anxiolytic, Sedative, Muscle Relaxant, Amnesia, Dystaxia, Hypnotic.
properties.summary: Known as Rohypnol or 'roofies,' this infamous drug has similar qualities to most other benzodiazepines; sedating with strong hypnotic effects. Despite being known as a 'date rape drug,' it has only been implicated in a small number of such crimes. The drug has risks of CNS depression that is increased in combination with other depressants. The drug may cause amnesia and lowered inhibitions in overdose.
